programme.desc: The history of Las Vegas through profiles of entertainers, entrepreneurs, the Mob and politicians over seven decades. The first edition reveals how the arrival of the Mafia and its money catapulted the city from a raffish frontier town to a glamorous entertainment destination featuring the biggest stars of the nightclub era.

programme.title: Vegas: The Story of Sin City
programme.desc: A look at Las Vegas's golden age started by a Rat Pack show in 1960, an era defined by a heavy-drinking, woman-chasing, irreverent kind of hipness embodied by Frank Sinatra.

Narrated by Whoopi Goldberg and Donald Sutherland.
